title: Buckets and Chickens
description: Tame chickens with sweet berries, make them sit, and carry them in buckets just like axolotls! Perfect for traveling with your feathered friends.
body:
# 🐔 Buckets and Chickens

Ever wanted to take your feathered friends on an adventure without the hassle of leads or seeds? **Buckets and Chickens** turns your ordinary Minecraft chickens into loyal companions!

### ✨ Key Features:

* **Tame with Berries:** Use **Sweet Berries** to earn a chicken's trust. Once tamed, they will follow you anywhere!
* **Sitting Mode:** Want them to stay put? Just **Shift + Right-Click** with an empty hand to make your chicken sit. They'll wait patiently until you tell them to stand.
* **Chicken in a Bucket:** Just like axolotls, you can now pick up tamed chickens using a **standard Bucket**. 
* **Stasis Buckets:** Baby chickens (chicks) caught in a bucket **will not grow up** while inside. They stay small until you release them!
* **Visual Feedback:** Custom particles show you exactly when a chicken is happy to see you or when it's time for them to take a seat.

### 🛠 How to use:
1. Find a chicken and feed it **Sweet Berries** until hearts appear.
2. Use a **Bucket** on your tamed chicken to pick it up.
3. To toggle sitting/standing, crouch (**Shift**) and **Right-Click** the chicken with an empty hand.
